name: Intercom Support Triage
tagline: Intercom conversation triage tools for support workflows
description: Registers `fetch_intercom_conversations` and `post_slack_summary`. Fetch recent Intercom conversations, classify them, then post grouped Slack blocks with links back to Intercom. Built for support triage workflows.

env.name: INTERCOM_API_TOKEN
env.description: Intercom access token used to fetch conversations.

env.name: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN
env.description: Slack bot token used to post triage summaries.

env.name: SLACK_CHANNEL
env.description: Default Slack channel to post to, unless a tool call overrides it.
